title: Joy Boy’s Drums Begin to Echo
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Luffy, Kaido as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Jaggy and them really are amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that mouth of yours just for show?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: hellooo? Don't you know how to speak?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Mamama Hahaha!! How old are ya?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is your first time teaming up with rocks?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's a good-for- nothing, don't trust him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If something's bugging you, come tell me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm the woman who'll rule these seas!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: me and that old HAG have a lot of history together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How could I let this happen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just swore that we'd help each other get the one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Fists backed by Fury Luffy's fierce onslaught!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Don't talk to me about your dreams!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your dreams made the people of this country starve!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm giving gear fourth one last go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't stop swinging until I have nothing left!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Where are these punches coming from?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
